case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. DORIS CAMPOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, DORIS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PANCHITAS RESTAURANT 2 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, DORIS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PANCHITAS RESTAURANT 2 $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

documents.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, DORIS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PANCHITAS RESTAURANT 2 $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
